style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with jagged edges, casting elongated, bending shadows that twist unnaturally around the body; slow-drifting mist particles in pale lavender drift upward in erratic spirals, while faint energy pulses of deep indigo pulse through its semi-transparent form, illuminating the mist with a cold, eerie glow; the lighting mood is a pale, ghostly blue-white luminescence that casts long, distorted reflections in nearby still water, creating an unsettling yet ethereal atmosphere. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
